data.title: Top prediction markets form coalition to fight back against lobby groups
data.description:
Major prediction market platforms, including Kalshi and Coinbase, have formed a coalition as a coordinated response to state casino regulators trying to flex their authority on prediction markets. The regulators claim that these new markets are unlawful betting platforms. Kalshi, Coinbase, Crypto. com, and other prediction market platforms have entered into a coalition to defend federal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/prediction-markets-form-coalition/

data.title: Strategy’s BTC Yield turns negative for first time in years
data.description:
The BTC Yield of MSTR stock in Michael Saylor’s treasury company, Strategy, has turned negative this quarter for the first time in years.
source: https://protos.com/strategys-btc-yield-turns-negative-for-first-time-in-years/

data.title: Six Fed officials opposed rate cuts as economy faces major threats in 2026
data.description:
Top officials at the Federal Reserve are sharply divided over where interest rates should go next, with several policymakers speaking out Friday following a controversial decision to cut rates earlier this week. The comments came just two days after the Fed lowered its benchmark interest rate by a quarter percentage point on Wednesday. That marked […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/six-fed-officials-opposed-rate-cuts/

data.title: Wintermute Transfers 435.91 BTC to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 03:05, a total of 435.91 BTC was transferred from Wintermute to an anonymous address beginning with 3DdT63.

data.title: Jupiter Unveils JupUSD Stablecoin and Major Solana Ecosystem Upgrades
data.description:
Jupiter announced seven coordinated upgrades at Breakpoint, led by JupUSD stablecoin developed with Ethena, alongside Developer Platform launch, Terminal consolidation, and Rain. fi acquisition to expand lending capabilities across Solana's DeFi infrastructure.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/jupiter-unveils-jupusd-stablecoin-and-major-solana-ecosystem-upgrades/

data.title: Bitcoin swings above $94K as crypto faces ‘Netscape’ moment: Finance Redefined

data.title: Pyth to launch reserve using buybacks from DAO treasury funds
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Breakdown Reveals A Deeper Market Dynamic
data.description:
A new snapshot of public Bitcoin treasury data highlights how mining companies now hold a meaningful, but still secondary, share of corporate Bitcoin reserves. The chart shows that mining firms collectively hold around 127,000 BTC, representing 12% of total publicly disclosed Bitcoin treasury holdings.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-treasury-breakdown-reveals-a-deeper-market-dynamic/

data.title: Aave Labs faces backlash over CoW Swap integration
data.description:

source: https://protos.com/aave-labs-faces-backlash-over-cow-swap-integration/

data.title: Coinglass Reports $140M+ BTC Long Liquidations Near $90K
data.description:
Coinglass reports that over $140 million in Bitcoin long positions were liquidated within one hour as BTC traded near the $90,000 level.
source: https://btcusa.com/coinglass-reports-140m-btc-long-liquidations-near-90k/
